name: Healthier Choices Management Corp.
business: Healthier Choices Management Corp. markets its patented Q-Cup and Imitine products. The company sells vaporizer technology for cannabis and CBD concentrates directly to consumers in the vaping market. It also seeks to monetize its intellectual property through royalty and licensing agreements.

exposures.sentence: HCMC is focused on marketing its current product offerings, including its patented Q-Cup and Imitine.
The Company closed all its brick-and-mortar retail vape stores, as management had shifted its retail sales focus to the wholesale and online channel.

catalysts.sentence: On December 31, 2025, the Company settled $4.0 million of intercompany debt through the issuance of 43,889,786,222 shares of common stock to Healthy Choice Wellness Corp. (HCWC), a related party.
On April 11, 2025, the Company and the lender amended the agreement to extend the maturity date from April 30, 2026 to December 31, 2026.
On September 13, 2024 (the Spin-Off Date), after the New York Stock Exchange American (NYSEAM) market closing, the Spin-Off of the HCWC business was completed.
